diagrams.title: Data Type Size Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual representation of relative memory sizes for basic C data types
diagrams.purpose: Helps visualize memory consumption and choose appropriate types for microcontroller applications

diagrams.title: Signed vs Unsigned Number Representation
diagrams.description: Shows how signed and unsigned integers are stored in memory bits
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how sign bit affects range and representation

diagrams.title: Memory Layout for Variables
diagrams.description: Shows how variables occupy memory in stack/RAM
diagrams.purpose: Understanding variable storage and alignment in microcontroller memory
